name: dbos-argus
description: Self-hosted, read-only workflow viewer for DBOS Transact — monorepo root.

scripts.dev:db: docker compose up -d --wait postgres && { docker compose stop argus >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; }
scripts.lint: uv run ruff check packages/server tests/sample-app && uv run ruff format --check packages/server tests/sample-app && pnpm -r run lint
scripts.test: pnpm -r run test && uv run pytest packages/server
